overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character sitting on a waterfront bench at night in a hazy, neon-lit futuristic city. The character interacts with a handheld device while seated, then stands up and walks away along the promenade, with elevated highways and digital billboards visible in the background.

events.description: character stands up from the concrete bench

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete bench examining a handheld device, occasionally shifting posture and looking around the waterfront area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away along the waterfront path in the distance

entered.detail: long concrete bench where the character is seated, with green metal armrests
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying a portrait of a person
curved elevated roadway structure with concrete support pillars and glowing lights
dark waterway running parallel to the walkway with reflections of city lights
tall metal pole with multiple light fixtures illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a hazy neon-lit waterfront promenade at night. The ego character sits on a concrete bench to the left, interacting with a handheld device while a digital billboard glows nearby. An elevated highway ramp curves through the background, and a lone pedestrian walks away in the distance along the water's edge.

events.description: character begins walking away from the bench along the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path, moving away from the bench area toward the open promenade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian continuing to walk ahead along the waterfront path

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated windows and neon signage visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and begins walking along the waterfront promenade, leaving the bench behind. The camera follows from a third-person perspective as the ego moves past the street lamp toward the open walkway. The water canal remains visible to the right while futuristic buildings with neon lighting emerge in the background, and the elevated highway structure shifts to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a static moment of reflection on a neon-lit waterfront to a steady walk through a futuristic cityscape. It begins with the character seated on a concrete bench, interacting with a handheld device beneath the glow of a nearby digital billboard and a curving elevated highway. As the character stands and begins to move, the camera shifts into a third-person perspective, leaving the bench behind to follow them along the promenade. The scene then expands as the character passes a street lamp, with the water canal remaining to the right while the elevated highway structure slides toward the left of the frame. Finally, the view opens up to reveal towering futuristic buildings illuminated by neon lights as the character continues their journey along the open walkway.
